name: canonical
description: Golden parity script: a fixed deterministic sequence of (date, ticker, side, qty) intents driving BOTH the Go engine and the reference Nautilus BacktestEngine over identical Sharadar bars. Covers every position-lifecycle transition the NETTING book must reproduce. Tickers + dates are fully inside the P0/P1 Sharadar import cache.

scenarios.long_open_close: AAPL BUY 100 (2021-01-04) -> FLAT (2021-02-01): a clean long realized-PnL round trip held across many bars (unrealized accrual in between).
scenarios.short_open_close_margin: KO SELL 200 (2021-01-04) -> FLAT (2021-03-01): a short opened on margin (AccountType.MARGIN) and covered.
scenarios.position_flip: NVDA BUY 300 (2021-01-04) -> SELL 500 (2021-03-01) flips long->short crossing zero to -200 -> BUY 200 (2021-05-03) back to flat.
scenarios.multi_symbol_same_day: On 2021-03-01 AAPL, KO and NVDA all trade: same-timestamp ordering must follow instrument REGISTRATION order (AAPL, KO, NVDA) deterministically.
scenarios.hold_through_bars: Every open position is held across multiple bars before being reduced/closed, exercising mark-to-market unrealized accrual in the equity curve.
